key_quote: The paper's baselines are straw men...Compiling PRAM algorithms to sequential code was an interesting research direction in the 1990s; in 2026, the motivation needs to be much stronger.
rationale: Core Hash-Partition Locality Theorem is genuinely novel, but claims exceed evidence on all three axes (formal, practical, probabilistic): no mechanized proofs, straw-man baselines, simulated caches at tiny input sizes, and a >10x unexplained theory-practice gap render the current execution insufficient for the ambition.
